---
title: "Antoine Boulet"
subtitle: |
    <span class="content-visible" when-profile="en">*{{< meta personal-informations.en.job >}}*</span>
    <span class="content-visible" when-profile="fr">*{{< meta personal-informations.fr.job >}}*</span>

about:
  id: description
  template: trestles
  image: assets/profile.jpg
  links:
    - text: <i class="ai ai-orcid"></i> ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0003-3839-6090
    - text: <i class="ai ai-arxiv"></i> arXiv
      href: https://arxiv.org/search/?query=Boulet%2C+Antoine&searchtype=author&source=header
    - text: <i class="ai ai-inspire"></i> INSPIRE
      href: https://inspirehep.net/authors/1631018
    - text: <i class="ai ai-google-scholar"></i> Google Scholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=UVnxCpwAAAAJ
    - text: <i class="ai ai-hal"></i> HAL
      href: https://hal.science/search/index/?q=*&authFullName_s=Antoine%20Boulet
    - text: <i class="bi bi-github"></i> Github
      href: https://github.com/AntoineBoulet

listing:
  - id: selected-publications
    template: ./system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ./data/research/selected.yml
    template-params:
      type: article
      lang: en
  - id: selected-courses
    template: ./system/templates/listings/badges-buttons-link-accordion.ejs.html
    contents: ./data/teaching/selected.yml
    template-params:
      type: course
      lang: fr

metadata-files:
  - ./data/about.yml

toc: false

css: system/styles/about.css
---



::: {.content-visible when-profile="en"}
:::{#description}

### Reserach
{{< meta research.en >}}  

*For more informations, check out my [research page](content/research/overview-highlights.qmd).*

### Teaching
{{< meta teaching.en >}}  

*For more information, check out my [teaching page](content/teaching/).*

<h3><br></h3>

::: {.callout-note title="Contact details" icon=false .contact-box}
<i class="fa fa-location-dot"></i><a href="{{< meta personal-informations.map >}}" title="">{{< meta personal-informations.en.office >}}</a>
<div style="margin-left: 1.65em;">
  {{< meta personal-informations.address >}}
</div>

<i class="fa fa-at"></i><a href="mailto:{{< meta personal-informations.email >}}" title="">{{< meta personal-informations.email >}}</a>  
<i class="fa fa-phone"></i><a href="tel:{{< meta personal-informations.phone >}}" title="">{{< meta personal-informations.phone >}}</a>
:::

:::

## Selected publications
::: {#selected-publications}
:::

::: {#selected-courses style="display:none;"}
:::

:::



::: {.content-visible when-profile="fr"}
:::{#description}

### Recherche
{{< meta research.fr >}}  

*Pour en savoir plus, consultez ma [page de recherche](content/recherche/).*

### Enseignement
{{< meta teaching.fr >}}  

*Pour en savoir plus, consultez ma [page d'enseignement](content/enseignement/).*

<h3><br></h3>

::: {.callout-note title="Coordonnées" icon=false .contact-box}
<i class="fa fa-location-dot"></i><a href="{{< meta personal-informations.map >}}" title="">{{< meta personal-informations.fr.office >}}</a>
<div style="margin-left: 1.65em;">
  {{< meta personal-informations.address >}}
</div>

<i class="fa fa-at"></i><a href="mailto:{{< meta personal-informations.email >}}" title="">{{< meta personal-informations.email >}}</a>  
<i class="fa fa-phone"></i><a href="tel:{{< meta personal-informations.phone >}}" title="">{{< meta personal-informations.phone >}}</a>
:::

:::

::: {#selected-publications style="display:none;"}
:::

### Cours sélectionnés
::: {#selected-courses}
:::

:::
